articles.title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
articles.description: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.

articles.title: Snap spins off AI video team into new company, Dotmo, due to costs
articles.description: The Snapchat maker is spinning off yet another internal unit. Dotmo will be composed of current Snap staff who are leaving the social media company to focus on AI video development.

articles.title: OpenAI is bringing on some big guns in the lead-up to its IPO
articles.description: OpenAI is bulking up before its IPO, landing Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week.

articles.title: The 11 standout startups from YC’s Demo Day, according to VCs
articles.description: TechCrunch spoke to investors to find the hottest startups in the Spring 2026 YC batch. Some of them commanded valuations of over $175 million, VCs said.

articles.title: Rivian owners file lawsuit alleging false promises on self-driving features
articles.description: Plaintiffs in the class action complaint allege Rivian falsely promised for years it would bring hands-free driving to its first-generation R1 vehicles.

articles.title: Almost half of U.S. singles feel negatively about AI in dating, Match says
articles.description: About 47% of singles look negatively at the use of AI in dating -- but, many dating app users are open to AI helping with profile punch-ups and conversation starters.

articles.title: Amazon hopes to challenge Nvidia more directly by selling its AI chips
articles.description: AWS is in talks to sell its chips to other data centers. CEO Andy Jassy has said this represents a $50 billion opportunity for the company.

articles.title: Mivo’s new app takes a mindful approach to managing screen time
articles.description: Doomscrolling on social media is a very common problem and can feel like an endless loop of constantly losing track of time. Instead of tackling this issue with strict limits, a new mindful screen time app called Mivo Scrolling is trying to shake things up. Launched last month, Mivo doesn’t look super different from other […]

articles.title: AI data centers just got a government-mandated fast lane to the grid
articles.description: FERC told grid operators to give data centers a fast lane for interconnections, but it failed to address electricity supply shortages.

articles.title: The smartphone era created an attention crisis. Slowtech is fixing it
articles.description: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

articles.title: Texas government data breach allowed hackers to steal 3 million driver’s licenses and passports
articles.description: A data breach involving government-issued ID documents affects over three million people in Texas.

articles.title: ‘Queer Eye’s’ life coach Karamo Brown launches Kē, a wellness app featuring his AI digital clone
articles.description: Karamo Brown, famous for his pep talks on Netflix’s “Queer Eye,” has jumped into the wellness and AI space with his new app, Kē. After spending a year and a half focusing on his own journey—from fitness and nutrition to meditation, sobriety, relationships, and personal growth—Brown wants to help others do the same.  Kē offers […]

articles.title: Spotify’s reserved ticket sales to music superfans are now going live

articles.title: Adobe adds its AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator and InDesign

articles.title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI推理初创公司Baseten计划融资15亿美元**：在上一轮巨额融资仅数月后，该公司再次寻求大规模资金，显示AI推理领域的资本热度持续高涨。  
2. **Snap剥离AI视频团队成立新公司Dotmo**：出于成本控制考虑，Snap将AI视频业务独立运营，反映出科技巨头在AI投入与盈利之间的权衡。  
3. **OpenAI为IPO引入重量级人才**：在上市前夕，OpenAI积极招募关键高管，强化公司治理与市场信心，为IPO铺路。  
4. **亚马逊挑战英伟达，直接出售自研AI芯片**：亚马逊通过向客户提供自家AI芯片，试图打破英伟达在AI算力市场的垄断地位。  
5. **美国单身人士近半数对AI应用于约会持负面态度**：Match集团调查显示，AI在婚恋场景中的接受度仍存较大社会分歧。  

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI推理初创公司Baseten以15亿美元融资规模领跑，凸显AI基础设施赛道资本竞争白热化；同时，OpenAI的IPO筹备与亚马逊的芯片战略，标志着AI产业正从技术探索转向商业化与生态争夺的关键阶段。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **AI智能体安全性与性能评估**：Hugging Face发布多项研究，探讨AI智能体的数据保密性（MosaicLeaks）、超越LoRA的微调技术、开源模型在自有工具上的基准测试，以及智能体资源发现功能，强调智能体的自主搜索能力。
2. **多模态与机器人技术进展**：MolmoMotion实现语言引导的3D运动预测；通过Strands Agents和LeRobot将Hugging Face Hub模型部署至机器人硬件，推动具身智能发展。
3. **医疗AI应用深化**：Google展示AMIE医疗AI管理健康能力；OpenAI推出ChatGPT健康智能改进、AI辅助诊断罕见遗传病、自主AI化学家优化药物合成，并发布生命科学基准LifeSciBench。
4. **企业级AI工具与部署策略**：OpenAI新增企业使用分析与费用控制功能；发布通过模拟部署预测模型行为的研究，提升模型发布前的可靠性。
5. **区域投资与开源模型创新**：Google加强在阿拉巴马州的投资与社区支持；GLM-5.2专为长周期任务设计，强化复杂场景下的持续推理能力。

**最值得关注的发展**：多家机构集中推进AI在医疗领域的落地，从诊断罕见病到自主化学合成，同时强化智能体的安全性与自主性，标志着AI正从通用能力向高风险、专业场景的深度渗透。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. 中国将于7月1日起实施新的列车运行图，其中包括开通北京至乌鲁木齐的高铁服务，进一步提升铁路运输效率与区域联通。
2. 中国专家批评菲律宾外长关于“日菲海上划界与中国无关”的言论，指出此举背后有超越双边谈判的别有用意，警告其可能破坏地区稳定。
3. 美国对智利寻求与中国合作铺设海底电缆表示反对，凸显中美在基础设施与科技领域的竞争加剧。
4. 七国集团（G7）试图限制中国稀土供应不超过60%，反映西方国家在关键矿产领域对中国的战略遏制意图。
5. 中国电动汽车价格战建立在亏损销售基础上，显示行业竞争激烈与盈利压力；同时，微软通过向中国销售OpenAI模型加大在华AI布局，引发技术依赖与安全讨论。

今日最值得关注的发展：中国在高铁、科技与资源领域持续面临外部竞争与压力，同时内部产业调整与创新突破并行，需警惕国际博弈对国内发展的影响。
